caption: A man wearing a blue button-down shirt is seated at a keyboard, singing into a microphone. He is positioned in front of a dark background with a red curtain visible to the left. The video uses a split-screen format, showing the man from the chest up in the top half and a close-up view of his hands playing a piano keyboard in the bottom half. On-screen text and musical staff notation appear to the left and right of the man. Across the sequence, the text changes from "D min" to "C Maj(add2)" and then to "C Major 3rd." The man's hand positions on the keyboard shift to correspond with the changing chords, moving from a position centered around the middle of the keyboard to positions shifted slightly to the left and right. The microphone and stand remain stationary throughout the clip.
